column1: • 'Used account' pricing = fair-market secondary/refurbished value for the base dual-controller array as configured.
• Anchored to live refurbished-dealer and eBay listings (July 2026), then scaled by raw capacity, controller class (AF40<AF60<AF80; HF40<HF60) and expansion shelves.
• Point = most-likely transaction price; Low/High bracket condition, warranty, and network-adapter variance.
• All arrays share HW End-of-Support 7/31/2028 — still supportable, which preserves resale demand today.
• Excludes: shipping, tax, active HPE support/InfoSight renewal, professional services, and any resident data.
• HF40 126TB HDD + 11.52TB SSD refurb — $16,875 (Enterasource) — exact match to array #1.
• HF60 210TB HDD + 23.04TB cache used — $23,995 (eBay, Core 4 Solutions).
• AF80 184TB used — $79,500 or best offer (eBay, Core 4 Solutions).
• AF40 46TB (24×1.92TB SSD) new — $19,995 (eBay); used scaled to ~55–65% of new.
• AF40/60/80 92TB flash field-upgrade refurb — ~€53,550 (it-market.com) — corroborates AF-series SSD $/TB.
Figures are good-faith estimates for planning only, not offers or appraisals. The used-storage market moves quickly;
confirm with a formal quote from a licensed reseller (Enterasource, ALTA, Spectra, etc.) before any transaction.
